  "verses": [
    {"n": 28, "column": "left", "text": "Bet tu paleez tahds pats/ 
un tawi Gaddi ne beigfees."},
    {"n": 29, "column": "left", "text": "Tawn Kalpu Behrni pa-

    {"n": 1, "column": "left", "text": "Ta CIII. Dseefma.
Irr weena janka Pateikshanas-Dseefma par
wissadahm garrigahm : 2/ 3. Un laizi,
gabm Labdarrifchanahm : 4/ 5. Betwiꞥſu-
wairak par to Schehlastibu/ fo wiꞥſch fa-
wai Draudsei ſcheit wirs Semmes parah,
dijs/ ſawu Wahrdn un Gribbeschann teem
finnamu darriđams : 7- etc.
1. Eena Dahwida Dseef-
ima. Teiz to KUNGU
mannna Dwehfele / un
wiſs/ kas eekſch mannin irr win-
na fivehtu Wahrdn."},
    {"n": 2, "column": "left", "text": "2. Teiz to KUNGU manna
Dwehfele/ un ne aistmirſti wiſſu/
fo wiꞥſch tew labba darrijs."},
    {"n": 3, "column": "left", "text": "3. Kas wiſſus tawns Greh-
kus peedohd/ un dseedina wiſſas
tawas Watnas."},
    {"n": 4, "column": "left", "text": "4. Kas tawu Dsihwibu no
Samaitaschanas iglabbj/ kas
tewi puſchko ar Schehlastibu un
Apscheblofchanahm."},
    {"n": 5, "column": "left", "text": "5. Kas tawu Mutti ar Lab-
bunu pee-chdina/ ka tu atjauna-
jees ka Ehrglis."},
    {"n": 6, "column": "left", "text": "6. Tas KUNGU isdohd
Taifnibu un Teefu wiſſeem/ kas
apbehdinati tohp."},
    {"n": 7, "column": "left", "text": "7. Wiꞥſch irr Mohsum fa-
wus Zeltus finnamus darrijs/
teem Israeta Behrneem ſawus
Darbus."},
    {"n": 8, "column": "left", "text": "8. Schehligs un lehntgs irr"},
    {"n": 9, "column": "right", "text": "tas KUNGS/ pazeetigs un no
leelas Schehlastibas."},
    {"n": 10, "column": "right", "text": "9. Wiꞥſch muhscham Kildu ne
tutrehs/ un muhschigi ne duſ-
moſees."},
    {"n": 11, "column": "right", "text": "10. Wiꞥſch nuums ne darra
pehz muhteem Grebkeem/ un ne
nakfa mums pehz muhteem No-
ſeegumeem."},
    {"n": 12, "column": "right", "text": "11. Jo zik augsta ta Debbes
irr pahr to Semini/ eespehzina
wiꞥſch ſawu Schehlastibu pahr
teem/ kas winnu bihstahs."},
    {"n": 13, "column": "right", "text": "12. Zik tahtu ta Rihta Puﬀe
no Wakkara Puﬀes irr/ tik tah-
tu leek wiꞥſch muhsas Pahrkahp-
schanas no mums buht."},
    {"n": 14, "column": "right", "text": "13. Itt ka weens Tehvos pahr
teem Behrneem apschehlojahs/
ta patt schehlo tas KUNGU
tohs/ kas to bihstahs."},
    {"n": 15, "column": "right", "text": "14. Jo wiꞥſch finna/ tahds
Darrijums michs effam/ wiꞥſch
peeminn ka mehs Dihtchli effam."},
    {"n": 16, "column": "right", "text": "15. Tas Zilweks eekſch ſawas
Dsihwibas irr ka Sahle/ wiꞥſch
feed ka Puﬀe Lauka."},
    {"n": 17, "column": "right", "text": "16. Kad tas Wehjſch pahr to
pahreet / tad winna newaid
wairs/ un winna Weetu wairs
ne pasihst."},
    {"n": 18, "column": "right", "text": "17. Bet ta KUNGA Scheh-
lastiba paleek muhschigi muh-
scham/ pahr teem/ kas winnu
bihstahs/ un winna Taifniba
lihds Behrnu Behrneem."},
    {"n": 19, "column": "right", "text": "18. Pee teem / kas winna
Derribu tuur/ un peeminn wiꞥ-
na Banſlus/ ka tee tohs darra."},
